seo.title: Colorway Starter
seo.description: A Nuxt starter for consumer-facing applications.

hero.title: A Nuxt frontend foundation for consumer products
hero.description: Colorway Starter brings Nuxt, Nitro, Vue, shadcn-vue, tests, and Docker into a clear engineering surface. It stays restrained, reviewable, and replaceable.
hero.workbenchDescription: Page data comes from Nitro API and server/queries
hero.verifyLine: verify, E2E, and Docker smoke checks all have fixed entry points

capabilities.title: From landing pages to lightweight portals, boundaries come before feature sprawl
capabilities.description: This is not an admin template marketplace or an implicit full-stack framework. Defaults stay lean, while auth, databases, payments, and analytics are left to explicit ADRs.

ssr.title: Nuxt SSR-first screens
ssr.text: Pages keep the SSR data path by default, so first-screen content and SEO data are not captured by client state.

data.title: Centralized data entry
data.text: Pages enter server/queries through Nitro APIs, while mocks remain replaceable data sources.

boundary.title: AI boundary checks
boundary.text: Client modules, server folders, environment variables, and API routes all have fixed review entry points.

verify.title: Fixed verification path
verify.text: verify, E2E, and Docker smoke checks form the starter delivery baseline.

proof.title: Put verifiability into the starter from day one
proof.description: Each entry point stays short, and each boundary has documentation and scripts behind it. AI changes can read the rules, edit locally, and run the same verification set.

login.title: Sign-in page entry
login.description: This page only demonstrates the client boundary for vee-validate + Zod. It does not connect to real auth. After cloning, choose an auth provider before moving submit logic into the server security boundary.
login.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.formDescription: This is a mock form and does not connect to real auth.

profile.title: User profile example
profile.description: This page looks like a signed-in profile, but v1 does not bind to a real auth provider. Private user data stays dynamically loaded by default.
profile.emptyDescription: Reserved for orders, saved items, or notifications in real projects.

recommendations.title: Client recommendations panel
recommendations.description: Requests only after user interaction, showing the Vue Query boundary.
recommendations.empty: Load local data after clicking the button, while the first-screen profile remains server-rendered.
